meta.title: AI Speeds — Free Web Apps: Language Learning, Poker Training, Games & Diving
meta.description: A collection of free web apps built at AI speed: learn Japanese, Chinese and English by scene, train poker GTO decisions, play a deep-sea merge puzzle, and explore ocean life. No sign-up, free forever.

hero.title: Free web apps, built at AI speed.
hero.subtitle: Language learning, poker training, games and ocean guides — open in your browser, no sign-up, free forever.

sections.languageSub: Vocabulary by real-life scene, with audio, quizzes and spaced review.
sections.pokerSub: GTO decisions from verified math — no made-up numbers.

kototabi.name: Kototabi ことたび
kototabi.desc: Learn 2,000+ Japanese words across 36 real-life scenes — flashcards, listening quizzes and spaced review.

mando.name: Mando
mando.desc: Build HSK Mandarin vocabulary scene by scene with flashcards, listening and fill-in-the-blank quizzes.

wordwing.name: Wordwing
wordwing.desc: Learn English vocabulary by scene, graded by CEFR level — flashcards, listening and fill-in-the-blank quizzes.

preflop.name: Preflop Camp
preflop.desc: Free preflop GTO trainer: opening, blind defense, 3-bet/4-bet, plus solved push/fold ranges.

postflop.name: Postflop Coach
postflop.desc: Train heads-up postflop decisions: 30 lessons and 699 verified drills covering pot odds, MDF and c-betting.

abyss.name: 2048 Abyss
abyss.desc: A deep-sea roguelite merge puzzle — merge glowing sea creatures, unlock skills and talents, dive the abyss.

fishid.name: FishID 鱼鱼图鉴
fishid.desc: An ocean life encyclopedia — collect and identify 270 marine species.

scubasites.name: ScubaSites
scubasites.desc: Structured dive site guides for divers planning their next trip.

about.title: About AI Speeds
about.body: Every app here is designed, built and shipped with AI as the co-pilot — hence the name. They are all free static web apps: no account, no paywall, no tracking beyond the basics. Pick one and just use it.

footer.rights: © {year} ai-speeds.com · All projects free to use
